name: roomio-multi-room
description: Agent C work-stream: multi-room floor plan + architecturally-correct connectors for Roomio. A House WRAPS Agent A's single-room RoomDesign (room.interior) — it never replaces it. Typed rooms (incl. kitchen/bathroom with research-grounded essentials), the full connector taxonomy on shared walls (opening cut in BOTH rooms by reusing A's wall/opening logic, ported read-only), and dismissible adjacency suggestions (AC1-AC9). Everything optional: a single bedroom stays a complete valid design, and old single-room saves still load. Pure TS logic + vitest; coordinates via /shared + roomio.txt; never edits A/B source.
